☕ Zambean

Lusaka's garden café. Specialty coffee, fresh food, antiques, and good vibes — since 2016.

📋 Full Menu

🍳 Food

The Full English

Two fried eggs, crispy bacon, fried tomato, pork sausage, baked beans, mushrooms and toast.

K200
Avo on Toast

Mashed avo on toast served with an egg. Simple, fresh, and perfectly seasoned.

K110
Vanilla French Toast

French toast made from our homemade bread served with crispy bacon, golden syrup and a touch of vanilla.

K130
Vegan Breakfast

Creamy avo, caramelized onions, fried mushrooms, roasted tomato and baked beans served on a toasted baguette.

K170
Blue Cheese Toast

Sliced avo, grilled tomato, fried egg, crumbled blue cheese and crispy bacon on sourdough toast.

K200
Bacon Scrambled Eggs

Creamy scrambled eggs with crispy bacon, mushrooms, avo with fried tomato on a toasted baguette.

K185
Bacon & Egg Roll

Two fried eggs in a fresh, lightly toasted sesame bun with crispy bacon.

K100
Eggs Benedict

English muffin, poached egg with a choice of ham or bacon served with Hollandaise sauce.

K195
Granola & Yoghurt

Homemade granola with Greek yoghurt and fresh seasonal fruit.

K135
Farmer's Breakfast

Two fried eggs, fried tomato, sweetcorn fritters, pork sausage and chips.

K200
Breakfast Croissant

Creamy scrambled eggs with crispy bacon and fried tomato on a freshly baked butter croissant.

K185
Eggs Royale

English muffin, poached egg, smoked salmon with Hollandaise sauce.

K250
Omelettes

Three-egg omelette with three fillings of your choice: mushroom, cheddar, tomato, bacon, feta, jalapeño, ham, onion, avo.

K135
Philly Cheese Steak

Thin-sliced beef, melted cheese, caramelized onions, and peppers on a toasted roll. Our #1 seller. Served with chips & salad.

K250
Beef Cheese Burger

Beef pattie, tomato, caramelized onions, lettuce and gherkins. Served with chips & salad.

K250
Smoked Chicken Salad

Sliced smoked chicken, honey mustard dressing, lettuce, feta, pecan nuts, avo, pumpkin and sunflower seeds.

K195
Margherita Flatbread

Crispy flatbread with San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, garden basil.

K100
Chicken & Halloumi Wrap

Halloumi, crumbed chicken, lettuce, avo, tomato and honey mustard mayo. Served with chips & salad.

K250
Falafel Wrap

Falafel, tomato, cucumber, lettuce and tahini yogurt dressing. Served with chips & salad.

K240
Bacon & Blue Cheese Burger

Beef pattie, bacon, blue cheese sauce, tomato and lettuce. Served with chips & salad.

K270
T-Bone Steak

Grilled T-bone with homemade mushroom sauce. Served with chips & salad or mash & veg.

K400
Chicken Schnitzel

Crispy crumbed chicken breast with cheese sauce. Served with chips & salad or mash & veg.

K300
Ham & Cheese Toastie

Classic toasted sandwich with ham and melted cheese. Served with chips & salad.

K175
Mozzarella, Tomato & Pesto Toastie

Fresh mozzarella, tomato and basil pesto on toasted artisan bread. Served with chips & salad.

K175
Garden Salad

Fresh lettuce, sundried tomatoes, feta, pecan nuts, avo, pumpkin and sunflower seeds.

K175
The Italian Sandwich

Homemade basil pesto, Italian salami, sundried tomatoes and parmesan shavings. Served with chips & salad.

K190
Club Sandwich

Grilled chicken, crispy bacon, lettuce, tomato and honey Dijon mayo. Served with chips & salad.

K185
Smoked Salmon Salad

Thinly sliced salmon on a bed of fresh lettuce with capers, feta, avo, pumpkin and sunflower seeds.

K270

☕ Drinks

Fresh Orange Juice

Cold-pressed from local Zambian oranges. Nothing added.

K125
Mango Lassi

Creamy yogurt blended with ripe Zambian mangoes and a hint of cardamom.

K50
Hibiscus Iced Tea

House-brewed hibiscus tea, chilled and lightly sweetened. Incredibly refreshing.

K70
Homemade Passion Fruit

Fresh passion fruit cordial made in-house. Sweet, tangy, and bursting with tropical flavor.

K65
Rock Shandy

Half lemonade, half soda, a splash of bitters. The ultimate refresher on a hot Lusaka day.

K85
Fruit Smoothie

Blended seasonal fruit with yogurt and honey. Thick, creamy, and energizing.

K120
Milkshake

Thick, old-school milkshake. Choose chocolate, vanilla, or strawberry.

K95
